tagged_types.name: GPIO_record
tagged_types.code: type GPIO_record is abstract tagged limited null record;

documentation.description: Set the value of an output GPIO.

access_types.name: GPIO
access_types.code: type GPIO is access all GPIO_record'Class;

documentation.description: Set the value of an output GPIO.
Read the value of an input GPIO.
